title: ryania speciosa var. subuliflora
intro: Ryania speciosa var. subuliflora, also known as Ryania, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Flacourtiaceae. Ryania is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating pain and swelling. The health benefits of Ryania include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic and arthritic conditions, and provide relief from headaches and other types of pain. Ryania is traditionally prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in the form of ointments and salves for topical application.
